source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the new mixed-precision physical feasibility abstraction.

requested_items.objective: Recompute Llama7B dual-stream physical feasibility using the measured q8/k8/v6 full-value attention tile PPA and the mixed-precision quality gate.

expected_result.reason: Use measured mixed-precision physical feasibility to decide whether the remaining frontier work is local datapath precision or compute-array density/fusion.
